exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.anatomy_pov: Builds the latissimus dorsi to physically widen your back, creating the essential 'wings' for a V-taper.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rows
exercises.anatomy_pov: Engages rhomboids and traps to build mid-back thickness, preventing a 'flat' side profile.

exercises.name: Bicep Curls
exercises.anatomy_pov: Isolates the biceps after they pre-exhausted during pull exercises, forcing localized hypertrophy.

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.anatomy_pov: The ultimate compound push. Works the pectoralis major, anterior deltoids, and triceps for upper body armor.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.anatomy_pov: Targets the clavicular head of the pecs, creating a 'shelf' that visually connects the chest to the shoulders.

exercises.name: Tricep Extensions
exercises.anatomy_pov: Isolates the triceps (which make up 2/3 of your arm mass) to ensure arms look thick even when relaxed.

finisher.name: Planks
finisher.anatomy_pov: Trains the transverse abdominis, your deep core muscle that acts like an internal weight belt to pull the stomach flat.

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.anatomy_pov: Requires systemic muscle engagement. Burns massive calories and triggers natural growth hormone release.

exercises.name: Leg Curls
exercises.anatomy_pov: Isolates the hamstrings to prevent muscle imbalances caused by heavy quad dominance.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lunges
exercises.anatomy_pov: Unilateral movement that forces core stabilization while spiking the heart rate.

schedule.notes: Focus on mobility work, stretching, and hitting daily protein goals to repair tissue.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.anatomy_pov: Builds overall mass across all three deltoid heads to create broad shoulder caps.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.anatomy_pov: Crucial for the V-taper. Explicitly targets the lateral head of the deltoid to widen your frame.

exercises.name: Russian Twists
exercises.anatomy_pov: Strengthens the obliques, tightening up the sides of the waistline where love handles sit.

schedule.notes: Let the central nervous system recover. Hydrate heavily.

exercises.name: Deadlifts
exercises.anatomy_pov: Strengthens the entire back of the body, violently improving posture which naturally lifts the chest and slims the waist.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldowns
exercises.anatomy_pov: A secondary weekly volume hit to the lats to force growth and back width.

finisher.name: HIIT Cardio
finisher.anatomy_pov: Forces the body to consume heavy oxygen post-workout, maximizing fat oxidation (EPOC).
